privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openvsp_wave_drag_area_ruling task by confirming that the task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model (eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3). Verified that all required parameters (Mach 1.05, min_slices 40, min_rotations 20) and expected output paths exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt, export_result.sh scripts, and verifier logic.
